supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on Amazon Web Services for cloud hosting services and computing infrastructure for cloud solutions delivery
supply_chain.risks: Third-party hosting service providers have no obligation to renew agreements on commercially reasonable terms. Disruption in services provided by third-party providers could adversely affect business. AWS has experienced significant service outages in the past and may do so again in the future.

regulatory_risks: Changes in budgets or regulatory environments of clients (primarily local and state governments) that could negatively impact information technology spending
Varying bid procedures and internal processes for bid acceptance in public sector
Legislative changes affecting local government's authority to contract with third parties
Compliance with government and stock exchange regulations
Criminal Justice Information Systems (CJIS) security standards established by the FBI
Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards compliance
Evolving legal and regulatory landscape over artificial intelligence technologies creates uncertainties
Uncertainty about extent to which privacy and data protection laws apply to artificial intelligence technologies
Issues related to intellectual property rights in artificial intelligence technologies not fully addressed by courts or regulators
Potential regulatory enforcement actions and litigation related to data breaches
State and federal reporting mandates for public safety operations
